overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage featuring a cinematic camera walk through a neon-lit urban alley at night. The clip begins with a prominent robot character, then explores a gritty commercial district including the '2nd Amendment' gun shop, with heavy red and cyan neon lighting, trash-strewn concrete streets, and industrial cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk alley entrance with robot sentry

events.description: camera passes the stationary robot and continues forward down the alley
pedestrian runs across the path from left to right in the distance

agents.ego_description: moving forward through the alley, passing a stationary robot and approaching a running pedestrian

notable_agents.action: stationary robot with glowing blue eyes standing guard at the alley entrance
pedestrian running across the alley from left to right

entered.detail: metal mesh fence with concrete base along the right side of the alley
large illuminated red sign for the gun shop visible in the distance
painted yellow line running down the center of the concrete street
large industrial support columns along the left side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stationary robot with glowing blue eyes standing in a cyberpunk alley at night. The camera moves forward past the robot, revealing a yellow center line on the concrete ground and a distant red neon sign for the '2nd Amendment' gun shop. A pedestrian runs across the path ahead as the camera continues down the semi-covered alleyway lined with chain-link fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk back alley with overhead structures and neon lighting

events.description: transition from mixed lighting to dominant red neon illumination reflecting off wet ground
turning corner into narrower passage with green-lit underpass visible ahead

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the alleyway beneath concrete overpasses, navigating past trash piles and industrial pillars

entered.detail: overhead concrete bridge structure spanning the alley
intense red neon strips illuminating the right wall and reflecting on the ground
scattered debris and garbage bags piled against the left wall
dark tunnel entrance with green lighting visible in the distance
exposed industrial piping running along the ceiling of the alley

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the narrow alley, now dominated by red neon lighting that reflects off the wet concrete ground. Overhead concrete overpasses and exposed industrial pipes create a claustrophobic ceiling. Trash piles line the left wall while a green-lit underpass becomes visible ahead. The 2nd Amendment sign remains visible but closer on the left as the camera navigates the industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gun shop interior and exterior with shooting range lanes

events.description: entering the 2nd Amendment gun shop from the alley through the front entrance
shift from red neon exterior to dimmer interior fluorescent and red accent lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the gun shop, passing neon signs and sale posters, then moving through the interior

notable_agents.action: shop patron standing near the entrance looking at merchandise on display

entered.detail: large illuminated posters advertising 'GUNS SALE!' with weapon graphics
traditional-style paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging from ceiling
neon sign shaped like a pistol with glowing red outline
long indoor shooting lanes with targets visible in the distance
industrial metal shelving units holding boxes and equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the gun shop entrance marked by bright 'GUNS SALE!' posters and a neon pistol sign. Red paper lanterns hang overhead as the camera enters the shop, transitioning from the red-lit alley to a dimmer interior with fluorescent lighting. Inside, long shooting range lanes extend into the distance while metal shelves line the left wall. A patron stands near the entrance examining merchandise.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor shooting range facility with benches and exit corridor

events.description: exiting the gun shop through the rear door back to the outdoor alley
returning to red neon exterior lighting from the dim interior environment

agents.ego_description: walking through the shooting range area toward the exit and emerging back into the alley

entered.detail: row of metal seating along the left wall of the shooting range
green illuminated exit sign above the rear doorway
open metal door leading back to the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the interior shooting range past metal benches and lanes, heading toward a green exit sign. Passing through the doorway, the scene transitions back to the red-lit exterior alley. The 2nd Amendment sign is visible again from the opposite side as the camera emerges from the shop.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk plaza with stairs and digital advertising

events.description: approaching concrete stairs leading upward to a higher level of the city

agents.ego_description: continuing through the wider alley toward a stairway, passing other pedestrians and examining wall posters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction toward the stairs
person standing against the wall examining digital posters

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to an elevated walkway
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on the right wall
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
tall futuristic buildings with multiple balconies and neon signage towering overhead
elevated pedestrian bridges connecting buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shop, the camera enters a wider plaza area with moderate pedestrian activity. Digital billboards and graffiti cover the right wall while pedestrians walk ahead toward a concrete staircase leading upward. Multi-level buildings with overhead walkways tower above, creating a dense urban canyon. The camera continues forward through the red-lit environment toward the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty, neon-lit urban alley that leads into a commercial gun shop before emerging into a dense city plaza. It begins by gliding past a stationary robot with glowing blue eyes, moving down a semi-covered alleyway where a pedestrian darts across a concrete path toward a distant red neon sign. As the camera pushes deeper into the narrow corridor, the environment becomes more claustrophobic under industrial pipes and concrete overpasses, with red light reflecting off wet ground and trash-strewn walls. The scene then shifts from the red-lit exterior into the dimmer, fluorescent interior of the 2nd Amendment gun shop, passing through a shooting range and past a patron before exiting through a green-lit doorway. Finally, the camera emerges back into the red glow of the alley and expands into a wider plaza filled with digital billboards, graffiti, and pedestrians heading toward a concrete staircase beneath towering urban walkways.
